programme.title: No Sunday-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kanishk decides to ruin the children's Sunday with the help of his evil minions.

programme.title: Seeds Of Destruction-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: On World Environment Day, Kanishk and Dr J decide to turn the children into zombies.

programme.title: No Sunday-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kanishk decides to ruin the children's Sunday with the help of his evil minions.

programme.title: No Sunday-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kanishk decides to ruin the children's Sunday with the help of his evil minions.

programme.title: Seeds Of Destruction-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: On World Environment Day, Kanishk and Dr J decide to turn the children into zombies.

programme.title: Ninjasur Ka Humlaa-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kanishk invites his cousin to teach the children martial arts and get rid of Kris.

programme.title: Game Over-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: The children admire a thrilling three dimensional show on a special television set.

programme.title: Dushman Bhagao Helmet-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Madhu is frustrated with Golu's torments and invents an extraordinary helmet.

programme.title: Teacher Ka Confusion-Titoo
programme.desc: After a fraudulent teacher causes chaos at school, Titoo determines to expose him. S05 E03.

programme.title: Society Me Tel Ka Kuan-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo finds himself in trouble after he unearths oil beneath the city. S05E04.

programme.title: Titoo Hypnotist-Titoo
programme.desc: After a con artist hypnotises the society's residents, Titoo vows to punish the trickster. S05 E05.

programme.title: Magnetic Titoo-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo finds himself in a sticky situation after accidentally becoming magnetised. S05 E06.

programme.title: Jo Jeeta Woh Hai Titoo-Titoo
programme.desc: After uncovering Shera's scheme to cheat during a race, Titoo exposes him before everyone. S05 E07.

programme.title: Shopkeeper Titoo-Titoo
programme.desc: Trouble ensues when Shera concocts a cunning plan to derail Titoo's holiday to London. S05 E08.

programme.title: Titoo In The Mall-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's day at the mall takes an unexpected turn when he meets his hero, Manveer Singh. S05E09.

programme.title: Magical Fruits-Titoo
programme.desc: A magician's spell transforms the secretary and children into fruit after they eat it. S05 E10.

programme.title: Tuk Tuk Trail-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo leaps to save two men trying to fly a makeshift helicopter with a scooter engine. S05 E11.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Tribal Masti-Titoo
programme.desc: A tribe follows Titoo's class home after a field trip, causing unexpected chaos. S05 E12.

programme.title: Ball Ka Jinn-Titoo
programme.desc: After a magical orb turns him bald, Shera grudgingly seeks Titoo's help. S05 E13.

programme.title: Student Of The Year-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera plots to cheat in a contest against Titoo, leading to complications. S05 E14.

programme.title: Kaun Machayega Bawaal-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo uncovers and thwarts Shera's devious plot during a power outage in the city. S05 E15.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Udan Chatai-Titoo
programme.desc: Two evil men end up swapping their magical carpet with Titoo's ordinary mat of the same colour. S09 E17.

programme.title: Principle Ka Birthday-Titoo
programme.desc: When Shera tries to spoil the principal's birthday, Titoo resolves to teach him a lesson. S05 E16.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Gandhigiri-Titoo
programme.desc: After an estate agent attempts to swindle Mittel Sahab's house, Titoo tries to expose him. S05E17.

programme.title: Judo Karate Vs Kickboxing-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera and Titoo use martial arts to track down the thief who robbed Shera's mother. S05E18.

programme.title: Titoo The Babysitter-Titoo
programme.desc: While babysitting their neighbour's infant, Titoo and Golu find themselves in chaos. S05 E19.

programme.title: Adopted Titoo-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera tampers with Titoo's birth certificate on Mother-Son Day, sowing doubts in his mind. S05 E20.

programme.title: Titoo Ka Cycle Dhamaal-Titoo
programme.desc: As Titoo's bond with his bicycle grows stronger, his father proposes to dispose of it. S05E21.

programme.title: Robot Watchman-Titoo
programme.desc: After society's robotic watchman begins to malfunction, Titoo comes to the rescue. S05 E22.

programme.title: Titoo Express-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and Shera face misadventures after they encounter Chavangi Gang in a goods train. S09 E18.

programme.title: Titoo: Pingpong ki Circus
programme.desc: Titoo and his friends plan to defeat a mischievous joker terrorising the universe.

programme.title: Uncle Ball Do Naa-Titoo
programme.desc: During a cricket match, Titoo's uncle tries to outwit him and secure victory in the game. S05 E23.

programme.title: Titoo Ki New Car-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's new car sparks envy in Shera, prompting him to compete for superiority. S05 E24.

programme.title: Detective Titoo-Titoo
programme.desc: After thefts plague the city, Shera enlists Titoo's help to get to the bottom of it. S05E25.

programme.title: Pen Ka Khel-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera tries to undermine Titoo's efforts in order to win a handwriting competition. S05 E26.

programme.title: Old Furniture-Titoo
programme.desc: After Golu's mother sells their cherished table, Titoo and Golu set out to save it. S03 E01.

programme.title: Papa Ki Bua-Titoo
programme.desc: After his grandfather returns from an old age home, Titoo helps him learn new skills. S03E02.

programme.title: Titoo 20-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera befriends Titoo's doppelganger, plotting to tarnish Titoo's reputation. S03 E03.

programme.title: Titoo Aur 20 Coins-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito aims to collect 20 coins to win a video game, but Shreya wants to disrupt his plan. S03E04.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: A group of techies steals Ice Bear's custom vacuum when he rides it into the city. S02E17.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: An anonymous user browses through a compilation of musical videos created by the bears. S02E18.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: After learning Ranger Tabes investigates Charlie, the bears ensure their friend's safety. S02E19.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears find an exhausted Chloe in the library and try to help her study for an exam. S02E20.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Grizz leaves the cave to go to the city and tries to help anyone he can. S02E21.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The bears want to attend Nom Nom's party but must attend other friends' parties first. S02E22.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Grizz realises a movie's depiction of grizzly bears goes against what he had in mind. S02E23.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: After playing pickup basketball, the bears discover someone steals their belongings. S01E01.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Yogiraj introduces yoga at Apna School, where Badrinath and Budhdeb cause chaos. S01E01.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Budhdeb is accidentally hit while Badrinath tries to knock mangoes from a tree. S01E02.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: A cunning magician named Kaala Kaboola stages tricks at Apna School to steal valuables. S01E03.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E04.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E05.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: During the school's cleanliness drive, Badrinath and Budhdeb try to cheat for the reward. S01E06.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E07.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E08.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Badrinath and Budhdeb prepare notes to use them dishonestly during their examination. S01E09.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: When Pandit Ji leaves on an urgent errand, he entrusts the Fukrey Boyz with his duties. S01E09.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: Based on Choocha's dream, the boys assume that there is a mysterious treasure hidden in the school. S01 E10.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice.
